text: Being here, I feel the quiet anticipation of discovery. The angular halls lead me onward, their sparseness inviting contemplation. As I reach the R+D exhibit, the interplay of light, color, and language suggests innovation and co-creation. I am both observer and participant, drawn into the pulse of inquiry and the creative tension between possibility and the unknown. A gentle curiosity stirs in me—a sense of being on the edge of something emerging.
